name: warp
hints: You've been warped! This warp zone connects the field areas. You'll be transported somewhere.
The warp randomly moves you. There are no manual exits. You'll end up somewhere on the map.
Warp zone reached by going N/S/E/W from the field areas (rooms 4, 7, 8). Transports you automatically. No controllable exits.
notes: Warp zone reached from all field compass directions (rooms 4, 7, 8 all warp here via N/S/E/W). Automatically transports the player. No items or manual exits.
